name: Avast One
tagline: Best free antivirus with generous feature set
description: Avast One offers one of the most comprehensive free antivirus plans available, with excellent protection and a surprisingly rich feature set at no cost.
longDescription: Avast One represents a significant redesign of Avast's product line, consolidating their antivirus, VPN, and cleanup tools into a single unified platform. The free tier is remarkably generous: you get real-time malware protection, a VPN with 5GB weekly data, a basic firewall, and system cleanup — all at no cost. In malware detection tests, Avast achieved a 98.2% detection rate with moderate system impact. The paid plans unlock unlimited VPN data and advanced features like sensitive data monitoring.
pros: Generous free plan with VPN included
cons: Some features only in Ultimate tier

keyFeatures.name: Free VPN
keyFeatures.description: 5GB weekly data allowance on the free plan. 50+ server locations. Built directly into the Avast One interface. Simple one-click activation.

keyFeatures.name: Sensitive Data Shield
keyFeatures.description: Scans for sensitive documents (tax returns, bank statements, passport scans) and moves them to a protected folder.

keyFeatures.name: Email Guardian
keyFeatures.description: Automatically scans incoming emails for malicious attachments, phishing links, and scam content.

keyFeatures.name: Driver Updater
keyFeatures.description: Scans for outdated drivers and updates them automatically. Reduces security vulnerabilities from unpatched hardware drivers.

verdict: Avast One is the best free antivirus solution available. The combination of strong malware protection, a built-in VPN with generous data allowance, and a clean interface makes it our top recommendation for budget-conscious users.

faqs.question: Is Avast still safe to use after the privacy controversy?
faqs.answer: Avast has made significant changes since the 2020 controversy over its subsidiary Jumpshot selling user data. The company shut down Jumpshot, ended all data-sharing practices, and implemented new privacy controls.

faqs.question: What is included in Avast One free vs paid?
faqs.answer: The free plan includes real-time malware protection, firewall, VPN (5GB/week), PC speedup, and Software Updater. The paid Individual plan adds unlimited VPN, Sensitive Data Shield, and premium support.

author.name: Sarah Mitchell
author.title: Senior Tech Reviewer
author.bio: Sarah has been evaluating cybersecurity products for 7 years.
